Measles and Mumps Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are measles and mumps tests? 
Measles and mumps Â are infections caused by similar types of viruses. They are contagious, which makes them easy to spread from person to person but vaccines can help keep you from getting them.
There are different types of measles and mumps tests. These tests can:
Diagnose an infection you (or your child) have now or rece
